welcome.title: Welcome to Claude Code Installer
welcome.description: This installer will set up everything you need to use Claude Code on your computer:
welcome.item_git: Git for Windows (required by Claude Code)
welcome.item_node: Node.js LTS (required for npx, MCP Servers, and dev tools)

systemCheck.title: System Check
systemCheck.description: Checking your system to see what needs to be installed...

installation.title: Installing
installation.cancel_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to cancel? Some components may already be installed.

completion.success_message: Claude Code is ready to use. Open a terminal and type 'claude' to get started.
completion.partial_message: Some components could not be installed. See details below.
completion.next_step_3: Follow the on-screen instructions to authenticate

postInstall.launching_message: Opening a new terminal window for Claude Code...
postInstall.launch_success: A new terminal window has opened with Claude Code running
postInstall.error_commandNotFound: The 'claude' command is not found in PATH. Try opening a new terminal manually.
postInstall.error_gitBashMissing: Claude Code needs Git Bash. Try re-installing Git for Windows.
postInstall.error_blocked: Claude Code binary was blocked by Windows SmartScreen.
postInstall.error_execFailed: Claude Code exited with an error. See logs for details.

uninstall.title: Uninstall
uninstall.description: Select the components you want to remove:
uninstall.git_warning: Git may be used by other programs (VS Code, GitHub Desktop, etc.)
uninstall.confirm_message: You are about to uninstall: {items}. Continue?
uninstall.done_message: Please restart your terminal for PATH changes to take effect.
